title: sa`iyr #8163
definition:
adj
 1) hairy

 n m
 2) he-goat, buck
    2a) as sacrificial animal
    2b) satyr, may refer to a demon possessed goat like the swine of
        Gadara (\\#Mt 8:30-32\\)
